seoTitle: South Kumminin vs South Kununoppin — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between South Kumminin and South Kununoppin. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: South Kumminin vs South Kununoppin: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in South Kumminin and South Kununoppin.
heading: South Kumminin vs South Kununoppin — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between South Kumminin, Western Australia and South Kununoppin, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: South Kumminin has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to South Kununoppin (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is South Kumminin or South Kununoppin safer from flooding?
faq.answer: South Kumminin has a flood risk score of 52/100, while South Kununoppin scores 44/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: South Kumminin scores 38/100 for bushfire risk. South Kununoppin scores 61/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in South Kumminin or South Kununoppin?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. South Kumminin has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.37% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
